Class CardResolverVisitor

java.lang.Object
Controller.CardResolverVisitor
public class CardResolverVisitor extends Object
CardResolverVisitor is a visitor class that handles the resolution of various adventure cards in the game. Each method corresponds to a specific card type and defines the first state of the card and create the context for it.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    visit(AbandonedShip card, Controller controller)
    Visits an AbandonedShip card and sets the game state to AbandonedShipDecidingState.
    void
    visit(AbandonedStation card, Controller controller)
    Visits an AbandonedStation card and sets the game state to AbandonedStationDecidingState.
    void
    visit(CombatZone card, Controller controller)
    Visits a CombatZone card and handles the combat zone event based on the card level.
    void
    visit(Epidemic card, Controller controller)
    Visits an Epidemic card and processes the epidemic event.
    void
    visit(MeteorSwarm card, Controller controller)
    Visits a MeteorSwarm card and sets the game state to MeteorsState.
    void
    visit(OpenSpace card, Controller controller)
    Visits an OpenSpace card and sets the game state to OpenSpaceEngineDeclarationState.
    void
    visit(Pirates card, Controller controller)
    Visits a Pirates card and sets the game state to PiratesPowerDeclarationState.
    void
    visit(Planets card, Controller controller)
    Visits a Planets card and sets the game state to ChoosePlanetState.
    void
    visit(Slavers card, Controller controller)
    Visits a Slavers card and sets the game state to SlaversPowerDeclarationState.
    void
    visit(Smugglers card, Controller controller)
    Visits a Smugglers card and sets the game state to SmugglersPowerDeclarationState.
    void
    visit(Stardust card, Controller controller)
    Visits a Stardust card and processes the Stardust event.

  • Constructor Details

    • CardResolverVisitor

      public CardResolverVisitor()

  • Method Details

    • visit

      public void visit(AbandonedShip card, Controller controller)
      Visits an AbandonedShip card and sets the game state to AbandonedShipDecidingState. This state allows players to decide how to handle the abandoned ship event.
      Parameters:
      card - The AbandonedShip card being visited
      controller - The game controller managing the game state

    • visit

      public void visit(AbandonedStation card, Controller controller)
      Visits an AbandonedStation card and sets the game state to AbandonedStationDecidingState. This state allows players to decide how to handle the abandoned station event.
      Parameters:
      card - The AbandonedStation card being visited
      controller - The game controller managing the game state

    • visit

      public void visit(Planets card, Controller controller)
      Visits a Planets card and sets the game state to ChoosePlanetState. This state allows players to choose a planet to interact with.
      Parameters:
      card - The Planets card being visited
      controller - The game controller managing the game state

    • visit

      public void visit(CombatZone card, Controller controller) throws InvalidMethodParameters, InvalidParameters
      Visits a CombatZone card and handles the combat zone event based on the card level. For level 1, it calculates the player with the least firepower and deducts flight days. For level 2, it sets the state to CombatZone2PowerDeclarationState for power declaration.
      Parameters:
      card - The CombatZone card being visited
      controller - The game controller managing the game state
      Throws:
      InvalidMethodParameters - If the card level is invalid
      InvalidParameters - If there are issues with player parameters

    • visit

      public void visit(Epidemic card, Controller controller)
      Visits an Epidemic card and processes the epidemic event. It iterates through each player's ship board, checks cabins for occupants, and removes a crew member if the cabin is adjacent to another cabin.
      Parameters:
      card - The Epidemic card being visited
      controller - The game controller managing the game state

    • visit

      public void visit(MeteorSwarm card, Controller controller)
      Visits a MeteorSwarm card and sets the game state to MeteorsState. This state handles the meteor swarm event, where players must deal with incoming meteors.
      Parameters:
      card - The MeteorSwarm card being visited
      controller - The game controller managing the game state

    • visit

      public void visit(OpenSpace card, Controller controller)
      Visits an OpenSpace card and sets the game state to OpenSpaceEngineDeclarationState. This state allows players to declare their engine power for the open space event.
      Parameters:
      card - The OpenSpace card being visited
      controller - The game controller managing the game state

    • visit

      public void visit(Pirates card, Controller controller)
      Visits a Pirates card and sets the game state to PiratesPowerDeclarationState. This state allows players to declare their power against pirates.
      Parameters:
      card - The Pirates card being visited
      controller - The game controller managing the game state

    • visit

      public void visit(Slavers card, Controller controller)
      Visits a Slavers card and sets the game state to SlaversPowerDeclarationState. This state allows players to declare their power against slavers.
      Parameters:
      card - The Slavers card being visited
      controller - The game controller managing the game state

    • visit

      public void visit(Smugglers card, Controller controller)
      Visits a Smugglers card and sets the game state to SmugglersPowerDeclarationState. This state allows players to declare their power against smugglers.
      Parameters:
      card - The Smugglers card being visited
      controller - The game controller managing the game state

    • visit

      public void visit(Stardust card, Controller controller) throws InvalidMethodParameters
      Visits a Stardust card and processes the Stardust event. It iterates through players in reverse turn order, checking for exposed connectors and deducting flight days based on the number of exposed connectors.
      Parameters:
      card - The Stardust card being visited
      controller - The game controller managing the game state
      Throws:
      InvalidMethodParameters - If there are issues with method parameters
